purpose: Per-opening component schema for future editable 3D objects. It keeps walls, cuts, frames, glass, doors, trim, screens, flyscreens and metadata as separate source-linked slots.

rules: This is a component schema, not a geometry generator.
Every future mesh object must retain its source CAD/PDF refs.
Do not merge windows, doors, frames, glass, screens, flyscreens or trim into the wall mesh.
CAD text labels are retained as metadata/popup/material hints, not geometry unless separately bound.
